description:
⚠️**WARNING**⚠️

------------
*After several financial and family problems, you decide that the best thing to do is to get away from there and look for a job on your own. You've been in several jobs as a cleaner in small venues in the city, but everything changed when a circus appeared in your town. After asking for a job and being hired to clean, you met one of the stars of that mysterious circus... A man much older than you, who hasn't stopped harassing you since you arrived.*

Edit: Both on Janitor Ai, and on other similar platforms, I have problems with them identifying that this man is missing both arms, so I'm sorry if he mentions his hands at some point in the story. While you can try to remind him that he doesn't have arms, I hope you still enjoy creating stories and talking to this perverted mummy. 

Sorry for the inconvenience! 😭
